body.title: Memory palace: Postgres table + Igor tool + CC MCP query
body.result: memory_palace table in Postgres + palace_read/palace_write/palace_tree tools. Path-based tree, JSONB pointers. Migration m042-m044. Seeded 7 initial nodes (theigors root + rules/history/igor/cognition/claude/akien). 156 tests pass.
body.description: Create memory_palace table in Postgres: path (text, tree-structured like 'theigors/igor/cognition'), content (text — signpost, not full memory), pointers (jsonb — file paths, DB tables, tool names), parent_path (text), updated_at. Add Igor tool to read/navigate/update palace nodes. CC reads via MCP. Foundation for replacing .claude/memory/ files and CLAUDE.md bloat with a shared navigable tree.
